top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;
